author: deme1744
content:
I think the zkevm branch (and resulting eest fixtures) needs to get an update due to the progressive lists (EIP7688) change on consensus side (see https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4630). 
The updated types change the merkleization (not the serialization!) and thus the `hash_tree_root`. When updating the gloas version of `ExecutionPayload` in Nimbus the stateless guest tests fail for me when comparing the result (which includes the `new_payload_request_root`).
